# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              limit:
                - 1000
              window_size:
                - 60
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "*"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Content-Type
                - Authorization
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claim_name: user_id
              secret_ref: jwt-secret
  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              limit:
                - 500
              window_size:
                - 60
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "*"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Content-Type
                - Authorization
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claim_name: user_id
              secret_ref: jwt-secret
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              limit:
                - 1000
              window_size:
                - 60
              policy: local
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "*"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Content-Type
                - Authorization
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claim_name: user_id
              secret_ref: jwt-secret
  - name: auth-service
    url: http://auth-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: auth-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/auth
        methods:
          - POST
          - GET
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              limit:
                - 200
              window_size:
                - 60
              policy: local
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - "*"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Content-Type
                - Authorization
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claim_name: user_id
              secret_ref: jwt-secret
